programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Jan Di's family hears about Jun-pyo's engagement and asks her miserably if it's true.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Ji-hoo can see how hurt Jan Di is by the kiss, and continues to follow her as she stumbles around in shock.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Jun-pyo begins seeing Jae-Kyung in a new light, like he's seeing her for the first time as a potential friend -- or maybe a kindred spirit.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Woo-bin tries to talk some sense into Yi-jung, who is determined to drink himself into a stupor.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: At home, Jun-hee reminisces about how her mother meddled in her life, in much the same way she's interfering in Jun-pyo's now.

programme.title: Dancing Cat
programme.desc: A documentary chronicling the daily dramas of Korea's street cats through the eyes of a poet.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Yi-jung is waiting outside for Eun-jae, excited to see her -- until he listens in on her phone conversation; from her words, it sounds like a call to a boyfriend.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Jun-pyo begs for Jan Di to advise him not to get married.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Jun-pyo tells Jan Di that he'll protect her, but to Jun-pyo's surprise, she says that she does not want to be cosseted or taken care of.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Perhaps feeling it's time to expose one truth, Mr. Jung leads Jun-hee to the unknown patient's bedside; at the sight of her father, Jun-hee breaks down.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Jun-pyo asks Yumi to make the lunchbox once more, confirming that Yumi had taken credit for her lunch.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Just being rich isn't enough to endure the teen oppression at Shinhwa -- loners are often marked as targets by the bored über-clique called F4.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: A wicked rumor is spread on the Internet that a second-year student at Shinhwa High School is pregnant.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Not too eager to watch Jan Di dancing with one of his best friends, Jun Pyo exits the ballroom and ends up taking out his frustrations by the poolside.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Making a rash choice, Jan Di tells her mother she has to go somewhere and runs off, heading toward Namsan Tower.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Jan Di's bike is set ablaze while she is attacked with water balloons and blasted with a fire extinguisher.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: A psychic foresees that Jan Di will be losing something significant.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Jun Pyo intends to expel his best friend and Jan Di out of Shinhwa High School -- and out of F4.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Jan Di dashes to the hospital after being informed that Jun Pyo had been in an accident.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Yi-jung gets a frantic call from his mother threatening to commit suicide because of his father.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Yi Jung's mother frantically calls him threatening to commit suicide.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: A note indicates that class has been moved to the science lab. The lab is unoccupied, but Jan Di waits, not realizing that the room is filling with fumes.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Jan Di's father gets kidnapped by loan sharks, which inevitably forces Jan Di's mother to swallow her pride and plead for Madam Kang's help.

programme.title: Black Light
programme.desc: A car accident leaves one man dead and another in a coma. The dead man's wife ends up learning that the victim had previously tried to kill himself. Suspecting the accident may have been on purpose, she begins an investigation.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: The F4 guys have moved on to college while Jan Di has entered her senior year of high school. She has not heard from Jun Pyo since he left.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Jan Di waits to hear the conclusions of F3's meeting with Jun-pyo, and can tell from their look that it was not good.

programme.desc: After treating Jan Di in a cruel manner, Mr. Jung prepares everything so that Jun-Pyo can visit her in Seoul. Will he be able to go without Madam Kang finding out?

programme.desc: At home, Jun-hee reminisces about how her mother meddled in her life, in much the same way she's interfering in Jun-pyo's now.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Yi-jung is waiting outside for Eun-jae, excited to see her -- until he listens in on her phone conversation; from her words, it sounds like a call to a boyfriend.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Jun-pyo begs for Jan Di to advise him not to get married.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Jun-pyo tells Jan Di that he'll protect her, but to Jun-pyo's surprise, she says that she does not want to be cosseted or taken care of.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Perhaps feeling it's time to expose one truth, Mr. Jung leads Jun-hee to the unknown patient's bedside; at the sight of her father, Jun-hee breaks down.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Jun-pyo asks Yumi to make the lunchbox once more, confirming that Yumi had taken credit for her lunch.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Just being rich isn't enough to endure the teen oppression at Shinhwa -- loners are often marked as targets by the bored über-clique called F4.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: A wicked rumor is spread on the Internet that a second-year student at Shinhwa High School is pregnant.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Not too eager to watch Jan Di dancing with one of his best friends, Jun Pyo exits the ballroom and ends up taking out his frustrations by the poolside.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Making a rash choice, Jan Di tells her mother she has to go somewhere and runs off, heading toward Namsan Tower.

programme.title: Hang in There, Kids!
programme.desc: Three boys grow up in a secluded indigenous tribe in a Taiwanese village. One day, they discover their handicapped teacher's musical audition tape and decide to bring the tape to the capital, Taipei.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Jan Di's bike is set ablaze while she is attacked with water balloons and blasted with a fire extinguisher.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: A psychic foresees that Jan Di will be losing something significant.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Jun Pyo intends to expel his best friend and Jan Di out of Shinhwa High School -- and out of F4.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Jan Di dashes to the hospital after being informed that Jun Pyo had been in an accident.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Yi-jung gets a frantic call from his mother threatening to commit suicide because of his father.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Yi Jung's mother frantically calls him threatening to commit suicide.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: A note indicates that class has been moved to the science lab. The lab is unoccupied, but Jan Di waits, not realizing that the room is filling with fumes.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Jan Di's father gets kidnapped by loan sharks, which inevitably forces Jan Di's mother to swallow her pride and plead for Madam Kang's help.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: The F4 guys have moved on to college while Jan Di has entered her senior year of high school. She has not heard from Jun Pyo since he left.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Jan Di waits to hear the conclusions of F3's meeting with Jun-pyo, and can tell from their look that it was not good.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: After treating Jan Di in a cruel manner, Mr. Jung prepares everything so that Jun-Pyo can visit her in Seoul. Will he be able to go without Madam Kang finding out?

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Jan Di's family hears about Jun-pyo's engagement and asks her miserably if it's true.

programme.sub-title: Transforming the Electrical Grid to Power AI

programme.title: Quantum Marketing

programme.title: Power Players

programme.title: The Canyon
programme.desc: A honeymooning couple has to survive in the Grand Canyon after getting lost.

programme.title: Good Neighbors
programme.desc: Victor is new to Montreal and attempts to make friends with the wheelchair-bound Spencer and the cat-loving Louise, but everybody is on edge with a serial killer terrorizing the neighborhood.

programme.title: High-Rise
programme.desc: A doctor (Tom Hiddleston) moves into a London skyscraper where rising tensions and class warfare lead to anarchy.

programme.title: The Ones Below
programme.desc: After giving birth to her first child, a woman (Clémence Poésy) starts to believe that her downstairs neighbors have sinister intentions.

programme.title: Held
programme.desc: A couple's ailing marriage gets put to the test when they are held hostage in an isolated vacation rental by an unseen voice that commands their every move and threatens harm if they don't obey.

programme.title: You Are Not My Mother
programme.desc: In a North Dublin housing estate, Char's mother goes missing. When she returns, Char is determined to uncover the truth of her disappearance and unearth the dark secrets of her family.

programme.title: Borderline
programme.desc: A helplessly romantic sociopath escapes from a mental institution and invades the home of a '90s pop superstar. He just wants to be loved; she just wants to survive.

programme.title: Bad Milo!
programme.desc: A stressed-out man (Ken Marino) discovers that a tiny demon lives in his intestine, and that excessive anxiety causes the creature to escape and slaughter the man's tormentors.

programme.title: John Dies at the End
programme.desc: A new drug promises out-of-body experiences, but users are coming back changed forever, and an otherworldly invasion of Earth is underway.

programme.title: Tucker & Dale vs Evil
programme.desc: Two scruffy pals' (Tyler Labine, Alan Tudyk) backwoods vacation takes a bloody turn when ignorant college students mistake them for a pair of murderous hillbillies.

programme.title: First Date
programme.desc: Conned into buying a shady '65 Chrysler, shy teen Mike's eagerly anticipated first date with the girl next door, Kelsey, implodes as he finds himself targeted by criminals, cops and a crazy cat lady.

programme.title: Rabbit Trap
programme.desc: While collecting audio samples, a musician creates a field recording of a mysterious sound never before heard by human ears. As the echoes of music bleed into the surrounding countryside, ancient and malevolent woodland forces are disturbed.

programme.title: The Windigo
programme.desc: A Native American teenager and his grandmother resurrect an ancient demon to protect their family from backwoods meth dealers. However, they soon discover that the creature's lust for killing can't be controlled.

programme.title: Malice in Wonderland
programme.desc: In London a cab hits a law student, who then goes to a land filled with riffraff.

programme.title: Hobo With a Shotgun
programme.desc: Hoping for heaven but finding an urban hell, a homeless man (Rutger Hauer) takes aim at a crime boss and the man's sadistic sons (Gregory Smith, Nick Bateman).

programme.title: The Burning Sea
programme.desc: A submarine operator descends to the ocean floor to save the man she loves from a sunken oil rig.

programme.title: Alan Partridge
programme.desc: Radio host Alan Partridge (Steve Coogan) gets a chance to boost his sagging career by serving as a liaison between police and his former co-host (Colm Meaney), who has taken hostages at their radio station.

programme.title: 2 Days in New York
programme.desc: A happily married man's (Chris Rock) sanity is pushed to the limit when his wife's (Julie Delpy) crazed, over-sexed French relatives crash their cramped New York apartment.

programme.title: What Just Happened?
programme.desc: A movie producer tries to engineer a reconciliation with his ex-wife while dealing with a number of problems surrounding his latest projects.

programme.title: Barry Munday
programme.desc: A slacker (Patrick Wilson) inherits new responsibilities after he impregnates a stranger (Judy Greer).

programme.title: Best Night Ever
programme.desc: Four young women have a series of wild and raucous adventures during a bachelorette party in Las Vegas.

programme.title: Tangerine
programme.desc: After hearing that her boyfriend/pimp cheated on her while she was in jail, a transgender sex worker and her best friend set out to find him and teach him and his new lover a lesson.

programme.title: The Great Buck Howard
programme.desc: A law-school dropout (Colin Hanks) becomes the personal assistant of a self-important but fading mentalist (John Malkovich) who is planning a big comeback.

programme.title: I Give It a Year
programme.desc: After a quick courtship, two lovers decide to tie the knot. As their first year of marriage unfolds, temptation and incompatibility put their relationship in jeopardy.

programme.title: Support the Girls
programme.desc: Lisa is the general manager of Double Whammies, a sports bar that features skimpily dressed waitresses. Always nurturing and protective of her staff, she soon faces one trying day that tests her optimism at every turn.

programme.title: Lemon
programme.desc: After Isaac's blind girlfriend walks out on him, his life goes into free fall, and he directs an unhinged staging of Chekhov's "The Seagull," attends the Passover Seder from hell, and attempts to woo a new flame.

programme.title: Nature Calls
programme.desc: After his troops ditch him for a slumber party at the posh home of his rival brother (Johnny Knoxville), a scoutmaster (Patton Oswalt) lures the youths away in the middle of the night for an ill-advised camping trip.

programme.title: Permanent
programme.desc: Aurelie, 13, dreams about getting a perm so that she can finally fit in at her small-town Virginia school. Things soon go incredibly wrong when her clueless parents bring her to a beauty school to save a few bucks.

programme.title: Person to Person
programme.desc: During a single day in New York City, different characters grapple with the mundane, the unexpected, and the larger questions permeating their lives.

programme.title: Results
programme.desc: Personal trainers (Guy Pearce, Cobie Smulders) are charged with whipping a newly wealthy and highly unmotivated slob (Kevin Corrigan) into shape.

programme.title: The Right Kind of Wrong
programme.desc: A stubborn idealist (Ryan Kwanten) spies a bride (Sara Canning) on her way to her wedding and immediately falls in love with her.

programme.title: The Magic of Belle Isle
programme.desc: An alcoholic, disabled novelist finds his muse again after he moves into a lakeside cabin and meets a single mother and her daughters.

programme.title: Diggers
programme.desc: During the 1970s an independent clammer and his friends watch their way of life slowly disappear when corporate fisheries invade the Hamptons.

programme.title: Tapawingo
programme.desc: When an oddball mailroom worker finds out that his boss's son is being bullied, he forms a ragtag team of would-be mercenaries to protect the boy.

programme.title: World's Greatest Dad
programme.desc: A high-school poetry teacher (Robin Williams) is also a single father and dreams of becoming a successful writer, but a freak accident leads to both tragedy and opportunity.

programme.title: Swan Song
programme.desc: A retired hairdresser escapes his nursing home and embarks on an odyssey across his small town to style a dead woman's hair for her funeral, confronting the ghosts of his past and rediscovering his sparkle along the way.

programme.title: Cryptozoo
programme.desc: In this richly-animated adventure story, zookeepers tasked with safeguarding mysterious and endangered mythical creatures must protect them from enemies far and wide.

programme.title: Filth
programme.desc: A drug-addled, manipulative misanthrope (James McAvoy) begins to experience increasingly severe hallucinations as he tries to solve the murder of a Japanese student.

programme.title: Take This Waltz
programme.desc: A young woman (Michelle Williams) is torn between the husband (Seth Rogen) that she loves and a new man (Luke Kirby) in her life, whom she's unable to ignore.

programme.title: Touchy Feely
programme.desc: A dentist (Josh Pais) gains the ability to heal his patients' physical pain while his sister (Rosemarie DeWitt), a massage therapist, develops an aversion to touching and being touched.

programme.title: Broken English
programme.desc: After a series of disastrous dates, an unhappy single woman (Parker Posey) meets a potential soul mate in a visiting Frenchman (Melvil Poupaud).

programme.title: The Architect
programme.desc: A resident (Viola Davis) of a crime-ridden housing project seeks out the property's original designer (Anthony LaPaglia) in the hope that he will help her get it torn down.

programme.title: It's a Christmas Thing
programme.desc: When 9-year-old Megan dedicates her Christmas wish to helping her mom Cara find love, her letter goes viral. Cara realizes that what she was looking for may have been on her doorstop all along.

programme.title: Sue Thomas F.B.Eye
programme.desc: Sue, Jack and the team pursue clues that link a Sudanese diplomat to slave trading; Bobby's girlfriend ends up in jail for exposing the Sudanese scandal.

programme.desc: The sisters host dinner for traveling male strippers, who fall ill and need replacements for their planned charity show.

programme.title: A Very English Christmas
programme.desc: Christmas in the English countryside isn't in Emma's plans until her sister, Amy, plans her wedding for Christmas Eve. Dylan, Amy's Christmas market co-owner, teams up with Emma to bring order to the whirlwind wedding.

programme.title: Christmas in Scotland
programme.desc: On vacation in Scotland, a New York installation designer is tasked with helping a small, rural community compete in a "Best Christmas Village" festival. She is forced to work with a wealthy, heir who sees Christmas as an inconvenience.

programme.title: A Very British Christmas
programme.desc: Opera singer Jessica Bailey's flight to her concert in Vienna gets delayed, and she is stuck in a remote area of England. The only place to stay is a bed-and-breakfast in an enchanting village run by a handsome widower named Andrew.

programme.title: A Merry Royal Christmas
programme.desc: A wedding planner pulled in for a last-minute royal wedding on Christmas Day is shocked to discover the groom is the alluring stranger she met before.

programme.title: Christmas on 5th Avenue
programme.desc: As they decorate a spectacular Manhattan penthouse for Christmas, bubbly Eva Jordan brings writer Lucas Blade some joy for the holidays.

programme.title: A European Christmas
programme.desc: When Christmas movie director Ivy has another 'heartless' flop, she seeks the star of her debut hit in snowy Serbia. Despite refusing to return, he shows her the wonder of Serbian Christmas.

programme.title: Sue Thomas F.B.Eye
programme.desc: A routine SWAT takedown of a suspected al-Qaida terrorist turns into a potentially deadly ambush for FBI agents.

programme.title: Sue Thomas F.B.Eye
programme.desc: Sue and the team are under the gun after determining seemingly random shootings are the work of a serial sniper.

programme.title: Sue Thomas F.B.Eye
programme.desc: Bobby's wayward father resurfaces with a surprising proposition; Sue starts to come to grips with her feelings for Jack.

programme.title: Dear Santa
programme.desc: Crystal, a rich party girl, finds a little girl's letter to Santa asking for a new mother, and she vows to win over the father and daughter before the holidays.

programme.title: Magic Stocking
programme.desc: Lindsey, a widowed single mother, stays closed off to life after losing her husband. When she buys a stocking at a craft fair, her family members begin finding items in it that have importance in their lives.

programme.title: Christmas Cupid's Arrow
programme.desc: A professor of English literature at a small college has had a long history of finding the wrong guy. After her younger sister announces she is pregnant, she decides she is going to make an effort to meet Mr. Right on a dating website.

programme.title: Creating Christmas
programme.desc: Aspiring illustrator Harper collaborates with demanding author Caleb. When he insists on working through Christmas in a quaint town, she must use the holiday celebrations to help break his writer's block.

programme.title: Waking Up to Christmas
programme.desc: On the verge of a massive deadline, a cynical workaholic must turn Christmas around in her small town after a small mishap.

programme.title: Snowy With a Chance of Christmas
programme.desc: A weatherwoman is tasked with saving her local TV station. When she partners with a toy drive run by a single father who only cares to give back and not give in to the holiday spirit, she finds her heart is something she can't predict.

programme.title: Dear Santa
programme.desc: Crystal, a rich party girl, finds a little girl's letter to Santa asking for a new mother, and she vows to win over the father and daughter before the holidays.

programme.title: Magic Stocking

programme.title: Creating Christmas

programme.title: Waking Up to Christmas
programme.desc: On the verge of a massive deadline, a cynical workaholic must turn Christmas around in her small town after a small mishap.

programme.title: In the Name of the King 3: The Last Mission
programme.desc: Transported back to medieval times, a contract killer (Dominic Purcell) encounters a fierce army and a fire-breathing dragon.

programme.title: Sharknado
programme.desc: A monstrous storm devastates Los Angeles, leaving the streets flooded and infested with sharks.

programme.title: Sharknado 2: The Second One
programme.desc: A freak weather system turns its deadly fury on New York City, unleashing a Sharknado on the population and its most cherished, iconic sites - and only Fin and April can save the Big Apple.

programme.title: Empire of the Sharks
programme.desc: In the future, most of Earth is covered by water and the only land is controlled by a warlord and his army of sharks. Humans are kept as food for the sharks until two friends risk their lives to rise against their captor and his legion of sharks.

programme.title: SnakeEater
programme.desc: Thugs kill the parents and kidnap the sister of a former search-and-destroy commando (Lorenzo Lamas).

programme.title: SnakeEater II: The Drug Buster
programme.desc: An ex-commando urban policeman (Lorenzo Lamas) must escape from a mental hospital to fight drug dealers.

programme.title: SnakeEater III... His Law
programme.desc: An ex-commando policeman (Lorenzo Lamas) with a sawed-off shotgun pumps belts of ammo at outlaw bikers.

programme.title: Soldiers of Fortune
programme.desc: A former Special Forces soldier (Christian Slater) must protect a group of thrill-seeking millionaires who have paid big bucks to take part in a military excursion.

programme.title: Empire State
programme.desc: A security guard (Liam Hemsworth) and his childhood pal (Michael Angarano) make plans to rob an armored car.

programme.title: Dredd
programme.desc: In a violent, futuristic metropolis, a law-enforcement officer (Karl Urban) and his rookie trainee (Olivia Thirlby) become caught up in a high-stakes conflict with a vicious prostitute-turned-drug lord (Lena Headey).

programme.title: The Condemned
programme.desc: A death-row inmate from a Central American jail is among the prisoners taken to a remote island for a to-the-death match broadcast live over the Internet.

programme.title: The Condemned 2
programme.desc: A former bounty hunter (Randy Orton) lands in a tournament where convicts fight to the death for an online audience.

programme.title: Accident Man
programme.desc: Mike Fallon is a seasoned hit man who is known for making his target's death look like an accident. When Fallon's girlfriend turns up dead, he goes after his old colleagues to find the one responsible.

programme.title: Accident Man: Hitman's Holiday
programme.desc: A hit man must beat the top assassins in the world to protect the ungrateful son of a mafia boss, save the life of his only friend, and rekindle his relationship with his maniacal father figure.

programme.title: Guns Akimbo
programme.desc: Miles is a video game developer who inadvertently becomes the next participant in a real-life death match that streams online. While Miles soon excels at running away from everything, that won't help him outlast Nix, a killer at the top of her game.

programme.title: Duchess
programme.desc: Duchess, a small-time crook, tries to enter the treacherous underworld of diamond trafficking and ends up left for dead when a deal goes wrong. Determined to seek retribution she launches into an unwavering pursuit for vengeance.

programme.title: Black Christmas
programme.desc: An unknown caller first harasses then murders a group of sorority sisters (Katie Cassidy, Mary Elizabeth Winstead, Lacey Chabert) during a holiday break.

programme.title: Last Knights
programme.desc: A fallen swordsman (Clive Owen) leads a small army against a sadistic ruler to avenge his dishonored master (Morgan Freeman).

programme.title: Primal
programme.desc: Hunter and collector Frank Walsh sails to America with a priceless white jaguar and a dangerous political assassin. When the prisoner manages to break free, Walsh must utilize his expert skills to capture the dangerous killer -- not dead, but alive.

programme.title: The King of Fighters
programme.desc: Members of three legendary clans fight battles in other dimensions.

programme.title: Accident Man
programme.desc: Mike Fallon is a seasoned hit man who is known for making his target's death look like an accident. When Fallon's girlfriend turns up dead, he goes after his old colleagues to find the one responsible.

programme.title: Accident Man: Hitman's Holiday
programme.desc: A hit man must beat the top assassins in the world to protect the ungrateful son of a mafia boss, save the life of his only friend, and rekindle his relationship with his maniacal father figure.

programme.title: The Delta Force
programme.desc: Terrorists reroute a passenger jet from Athens to Beirut, where commandos (Chuck Norris, Lee Marvin) are waiting to negotiate.

programme.title: Cyborg 2: Glass Shadow
programme.desc: In 2074 a video image (Jack Palance) and a man (Elias Koteas) must save a cyborg (Angelina Jolie) before it self-detonates in an electronics company.

programme.title: Dredd
programme.desc: In a violent, futuristic metropolis, a law-enforcement officer (Karl Urban) and his rookie trainee (Olivia Thirlby) become caught up in a high-stakes conflict with a vicious prostitute-turned-drug lord (Lena Headey).

programme.title: The Boondock Saints
programme.desc: Two brothers (Sean Patrick Flanery, Norman Reedus), believing themselves to be on a mission from God, begin killing members of Boston's underworld.

programme.title: Punisher: War Zone
programme.desc: Frank Castle, known as the Punisher, ruthlessly demolishes organized crime, but it starts an even bigger war.

programme.title: Dredd
programme.desc: In a violent, futuristic metropolis, a law-enforcement officer (Karl Urban) and his rookie trainee (Olivia Thirlby) become caught up in a high-stakes conflict with a vicious prostitute-turned-drug lord (Lena Headey).

programme.title: Outcast
programme.desc: A fugitive Chinese prince and his sister enlist the aid of two war-weary Crusaders (Nicolas Cage, Hayden Christensen) to help them defeat their older brother, who murdered their father and seized the throne.

programme.title: Planet of the Sharks
programme.desc: Global warming has melted Earth's glacial mass, submerging nearly the entire planet in water. Sharks now dominate the planet as one massive school is led by a mutant alpha.

programme.title: Sharknado 2: The Second One
programme.desc: A freak weather system turns its deadly fury on New York City, unleashing a Sharknado on the population and its most cherished, iconic sites - and only Fin and April can save the Big Apple.

programme.title: Acts of Vengeance
programme.desc: A fast-talking lawyer transforms his body and takes a vow of silence, not to be broken until he finds out who killed his wife and daughter and has his revenge.

programme.title: Green Street Hooligans: Underground
programme.desc: After his brother dies in an organized fight, a one-time hooligan who has become a martial artist returns to avenge the young man.

programme.title: Missing in Action
programme.desc: A U.S. colonel (Chuck Norris) escapes from the Viet Cong, then comes back with a floating arsenal to get others out.

programme.title: Missing in Action 2: The Beginning
programme.desc: An imprisoned U.S. colonel (Chuck Norris) fights the military overlord (Oh Soon-tek) of a slave-labor opium operation in Vietnam.

programme.title: Braddock: Missing in Action III
programme.desc: A U.S. colonel (Chuck Norris) returns to Vietnam and fights his way out with his wife, son (Roland Harrah III) and Amerasian orphans.

programme.title: Contract Killer
programme.desc: A fast talker (Eric Tsang) engages a Hong Kong rube (Jet Li) to track down the assassin of a sleazy Japanese businessman.

programme.title: USS Indianapolis: Men of Courage
programme.desc: After their ship is torpedoed by a Japanese submarine, the crew members of the USS Indianapolis face a harrowing nightmare as their ship goes down in the shark infested Philippine Sea.

programme.title: The Last Stand
programme.desc: A sheriff must take matters into his own hands when a notorious drug lord escapes from FBI custody and comes speeding toward a showdown in the lawman's quiet border town.

programme.title: Killing Them Softly
programme.desc: After a rival crook hires a pair of bumbling thieves (Scoot McNairy, Ben Mendelsohn) to rob their card game, mobsters hire a reluctant hit man (Brad Pitt) to settle the score.

programme.desc: Un programa de entretenimiento donde los actores, cantantes o bandas están invitados a formar dos equipos y realizar retos, el equipo ganador gana dinero para una organización o caridad.

programme.title: Fled
programme.desc: Escaped convicts (Laurence Fishburne, Stephen Baldwin) fight while they evade authorities seeking a computer disk on Cuban mobsters.

programme.title: The Inevitable Defeat of Mister & Pete
programme.desc: The sons (Skylan Brooks, Ethan Dizon) of two drug-addled hookers must fend for themselves after one's mother goes missing and the other (Jennifer Hudson) is arrested.

programme.title: Denzel Washington: Falling Forward
programme.desc: From humble beginnings to Oscar-winning Hollywood icon, actor Denzel Washington's career spans television, film and Broadway.

programme.title: The Women of Brewster Place
programme.desc: A multigenerational story of the lives of several black women who call an inner-city tenement home.

programme.title: Breakin' 2: Electric Boogaloo
programme.desc: Kelly (Lucinda Dickey) quits her job dancing in a chorus line in Los Angeles and goes home. Ignoring her father's wishes, Kelly teams up with her friends for a break-dancing benefit show to save an endangered community center.

programme.title: The Waterboyz
programme.desc: Two young men cross paths on the dangerous streets of Atlanta. One tries to make a legitimate living, while the other tries to create mayhem and rule the streets.

programme.title: 100 Streets
programme.desc: Three different stories covering infidelity, adoption and a drug dealer turned actor are intertwined as characters meet in the streets of London.

programme.title: The Love Doctor
programme.desc: A matchmaker, Nick, reeling from heartbreak, helps a shy client, Emma, prep for dating with "practice dates," only to catch real feelings. With a new suitor, meddling moms, and a Christmas mix-up, love proves harder to coach than expected.

programme.title: Little Boxes
programme.desc: An interracial family (Melanie Lynskey, Nelsan Ellis, Armani Jackson) struggles to adjust after moving from New York City to a small, predominately white town in Washington state.

programme.title: Youngblood
programme.desc: An angry Vietnam veteran (Lawrence-Hilton Jacobs) leads a Los Angeles street gang in a war on drug dealers.

programme.title: A Murder of Crows
programme.desc: A lawyer (Cuba Gooding Jr.) must prove he is innocent of murder after passing a dead man's tale of intrigue off as his own.

programme.title: The Last Letter
programme.desc: Catherine Wright struggles with a debilitating sleep disorder. Her husband Michael struggles to cope when their newborn son lay in the wake.

programme.title: Monster's Ball
programme.desc: A racist prison guard has an affair with a Black woman after her husband, who was sentenced to capital punishment, dies.

programme.title: Lee Daniels' The Butler
programme.desc: A White House butler (Forest Whitaker) has a front-row seat to history through three decades and seven presidential administrations, including those of Eisenhower (Robin Williams), Kennedy (James Marsden) and Nixon (John Cusack).

programme.title: Body Count
programme.desc: An art thief (Ice-T) who killed a family learns the son (Justin Theroux) and his girlfriend (Alyssa Milano) are still in the house.

programme.title: Slow Burn
programme.desc: A district attorney (Ray Liotta) must sort out conflicting stories when his assistant DA and sometime lover (Jolene Blalock) claims that the dead man in her bed tried to rape her, but a witness (LL Cool J) tells a different tale.

programme.title: Exposed
programme.desc: While investigating the death of his partner, a detective (Keanu Reeves) uncovers police corruption and a dangerous secret involving a young woman (Ana de Armas).

programme.title: Reasonable Doubt
programme.desc: A prosecutor (Dominic Cooper) commits a fatal hit-and-run, then manipulates the case so that the man who was arrested for the crime is acquitted. After the trial, he discovers that his actions have freed a guilty man.

programme.title: Night Train
programme.desc: Greed and betrayal ensnares three people (Danny Glover, Steve Zahn, Leelee Sobieski) when they find a stash of diamonds aboard a train.

programme.title: A Murder of Crows
programme.desc: A lawyer (Cuba Gooding Jr.) must prove he is innocent of murder after passing a dead man's tale of intrigue off as his own.

programme.title: The Son of No One
programme.desc: A rookie police officer (Channing Tatum) who once killed a pair of junkies in his youth remains haunted by the incident.

programme.title: Rappin'
programme.desc: An ex-convict (Mario Van Peebles) shows residents of his Pittsburgh ghetto how to drive out riffraff with rap music.

programme.title: How I Learned to Fly
programme.desc: Two African-American teenage boys are suddenly and mysteriously abandoned by their parents, forcing them to learn how to survive on their own. From this desertion, comes an experience of beauty, meaning and enduring love.

programme.title: Cut Throat City
programme.desc: When Hurricane Katrina devastates New Orleans, four desperate friends band together to pull off a daring heist in the heart of the city.

programme.title: Triple Threat
programme.desc: A crime syndicate places a hit on a billionaire's daughter, making her the target of an elite assassin squad. A band of down-and-out mercenaries protects her, fighting tooth and nail to stop the assassins from reaching their target.

programme.title: Foxy Brown
programme.desc: A nurse (Pam Grier) takes revenge on a drug ring for the slaying of her undercover-officer boyfriend.

programme.title: The Island
programme.desc: When his brother is killed, LAPD officer Mark leaves the city to return to the island he grew up on. Seeking answers and vengeance, he soon finds himself in a bloody battle with the corrupt tycoon who's taken over the island paradise.

programme.title: Sprung
programme.desc: Friends of each partner conspire to break up new lovers (Tisha Campbell, Rusty Cundieff), then to reconcile them.

programme.title: 10 Items or Less
programme.desc: Researching a role at a grocery store, an actor (Morgan Freeman) bonds with a feisty cashier (Paz Vega) who is preparing to interview for a new job.

programme.title: The Reluctant Agent
programme.desc: A waitress is thrust into a deadly game of intrigue when she agrees to impersonate her twin sister, a federal agent.

programme.title: The Mighty Quinn
programme.desc: Power figures want a Caribbean police chief (Denzel Washington) to find his friend Maubee (Robert Townsend), their scapegoat for a murder.
A Los Angeles high-school teacher (Samuel L. Jackson) confronts violent students with a grudge against him and society.

programme.title: Addicted
programme.desc: A successful businesswoman (Sharon Leal) puts her family, career and life on the line to satisfy her addiction to sex.

programme.title: Beyond the Lights
programme.desc: A troubled star and an aspiring politician fall deeply in love, but those around the couple urge them to put their careers ahead of romance.

programme.title: Fled
programme.desc: Escaped convicts (Laurence Fishburne, Stephen Baldwin) fight while they evade authorities seeking a computer disk on Cuban mobsters.

programme.title: Cops and Robbers
programme.desc: A hostage negotiator plays a dangerous game of cat and mouse with a cornered bank robber who is hell-bent on getting out of the bank and humiliating the negotiator in the process.

programme.title: Set Up
programme.desc: With help from a gangster, a betrayed man (Curtis "50 Cent" Jackson) seeks revenge for a heist gone wrong.

programme.title: Barbecue: Life of Fire
programme.desc: Pat Martin travels to Gainesboro, Tennessee to visit a free-range hog farm, learn about their operations, and grill up a less desired, but no less delicious, cut of hog - pork steaks.

programme.title: Barbecue: Life of Fire
programme.sub-title: Red Curry Braised Pork with Mustard Greens
programme.desc: Pat Martin is in the frozen tundra of Minnesota to visit his new friend, Chef Yia Vang. They brave the cold and break nearly-frozen ground to barbecue a pig's head in the earth.

programme.title: Barbecue: Life of Fire
programme.sub-title: The Secret to Texas-Style Smoked Brisket
programme.desc: Pat and his buddy Leonard Botello use the flavors of the beloved native Post Oak to smoke a perfect Central Texas-style beef brisket.

programme.title: Barbecue: Life of Fire
programme.sub-title: The Legend of Louis Mueller's Dino Beef Ribs
programme.desc: Pat visits his close friend Wayne Mueller, third-generation pitmaster of Louis Mueller's BBQ, to learn the ins and outs of his famous dino beef ribs.

programme.title: Barbecue: Life of Fire
programme.desc: Pat Martin travels to a picturesque cattle farm in California's Santa Maria Valley, to hear firsthand from a young pitmaster who has uncovered the secrets of real Santa Maria barbecue.

programme.title: Barbecue: Life of Fire
programme.sub-title: Pit-Cooked Chicken with Alabama White Sauce
programme.desc: Pat Martin travels to Decatur, Alabama to visit a storied institution of barbecue - Big Bob Gibson's. There, he learns the ins, the outs, and the history of a regional delicacy: pit-cooked chicken with Alabama white sauce.

programme.title: Barbecue: Life of Fire
programme.desc: Pat Martin teams up with fellow pitmasters to showcase the rugged and nuanced tradition of whole-hog cooking, West Tennessee-style.

programme.title: Barbecue: Life of Fire
programme.desc: Pat travels to the Emerald Coast of Destin, Florida, to join his friend Adam Evans on a spearfishing adventure, sourcing fresh fish to cook over live fire.

programme.title: Barbecue: Life of Fire
programme.sub-title: Bluefin Tuna Collars with Chili Pickle Relish
programme.desc: Pat Martin visits chef Adam Perry Lang in Los Angeles, where the pair cooks a prized catch castoff cut - Bluefin Tuna collars.

programme.title: Barbecue: Life of Fire
programme.sub-title: Catching Gulf Coast Redfish and Blue Crabs
programme.desc: Pat visits Houston to go Gulf Bay fishing with chef Chris Shepherd, hoping to catch some redfish and gather a side of blue crabs.

programme.title: Barbecue: Life of Fire
programme.desc: Pat visits Edgar Victoria, known for bringing the street foods of Mexico City to Nashville, to do some live fire cooking out in nature as they prepare one of his favorite dishes - skirt steak tlayuda.

programme.title: Barbecue: Life of Fire
programme.desc: Pat meets the trio behind Blood Bros BBQ to discover how three childhood friends seamlessly blended their Asian-American culture with the Texas barbecue traditions they grew up with.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver's Money-Saving Meals
programme.sub-title: Easy Chicken Curry and Feta Tomato Pasta
programme.desc: Jamie makes an air-fryer tomato and roast feta pasta using leftover noodles, a budget rolled carrot cake, and a cheap family chicken curry. Plus, an epic cheese-on-toast Welsh rarebit upgrade and frozen fish Chinese-inspired dough parcels!

programme.title: Jamie Oliver Cooks the Mediterranean
programme.desc: Jamie heads to Marseille in the south of France. Inspired by their stunning seafood, the traditional flavors of Provence, and the multicultural dishes being served up there, he cooks up a steak with a twist and a sublime courgette and olive tart.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver Cooks the Mediterranean
programme.desc: Jamie's soaking up inspiration in Spain with tapas, flavor-charged rice dishes, and spectacular seafood. He cooks a stunning pork chop with peppers and aioli and a surf and turf skewer of prawns, mushrooms, and local ham.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver Cooks the Mediterranean
programme.desc: Jamie heads to Greece, to the island of Skopelos, starting on the mainland in Thessaloniki. Inspired by meze plates and traditional island cuisine he cooks up a smoky aubergine flatbread and a lemony chargrilled chicken with tzatziki and rice.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver Cooks the Mediterranean
programme.desc: Jamie explores Tunisia to meet traditional couscous makers, eat delicious street food, and get invited to cook with local chefs on a beach. Inspired by everything he sees, Jamie cooks crispy prawn parcels and a chicken and merguez sausage stew.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: Gualberto "Weber" Elizondo surprised his family when his grilling hobby turned him into a local celebrity and internet sensation. Meanwhile, chef Chuy Villareal of Cara De Vaca wants the world to know that the north of Mexico isn't just carne asada.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: Two sisters made a little shack on the Rio Ramos into a must-visit restaurant known for one dish: cortadillo stew. Down the road, another restaurant uses traditional stews in their famous empalmes.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: Nuevo León is divided between two pro soccer teams: Los Tigres and Los Rayados. Pati tries the food at each stadium with the teams' stars to determine who wins in the battle of tortas vs tacos.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: Irving Quiroz wrote the book on Mexican bread. Pati visits his workshop for his secret to making the perfect campechana, then meets Chuy Elizondo, owner of one of the hottest brunch spots in town.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: The Garza family invites Pati to their vineyard to help the community make piloncillo - and it's hard work! Then, in the magic town of Bustamante, three sisters make traditional bread in adobe ovens.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: Gaby Molinar owns Huerto Urbano, an urban farm dedicated to providing Monterrey with nutritious, diverse local ingredients. And her husband is one of the region's greatest culinary pioneers.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.sub-title: Cantina Culture and the Morning After?
programme.desc: Cantinas have historically been bars where men gather to drink and sing about their broken hearts. Historian David Canales takes Pati to historic locations. Then she tries the best tacos in town.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.sub-title: Texas BBQ in the Orange Belt
programme.desc: Pati visits BBQ champion Luis Rivas to taste his Mexican take on Texas-style BBQ, and he hosts a traditional carne asada at his family's orange grove. Then Pati learns how Glorias candies are made.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: Chef Hugo Guajardo researches the best of Nuevo León's ingredients. He and Pati visit a family-owned restaurant that has perfected the art of drying meat. Then, she tries his famed charred chicken.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: Pati's climber friends take her on an adventure to the Sierra Madre mountains, followed by a quick elote snack. Later, Pati connects with four top chefs for a carne asada with a mountain backdrop.

programme.title: Grill'n After Dark
programme.desc: Tonight is a trio of backyard burgers! We're making Oklahoma Smashed Onion Burgers, New York Steakhouse Burgers and Fries, and Bougie Castle-Inspired Sliders.

programme.title: Grill'n After Dark
programme.desc: We're grilling our three favorite styles of pizza tonight: Chicago Tavern with Sausage and Hot Giardiniera, New York Ricotta and Hot Honey, and a spicy Detroit Pepperoni.

programme.title: Grill'n After Dark
programme.desc: It's sandwich night! We're making our favorite handheld late-night delights: Chicken Parm Hero, (Not a Philly) Cheesesteak, and Bodega Chopped Cheese. We're going to light the grills, pour some drinks, and show you how to make 'em in your backyard.

programme.title: Grill'n After Dark
programme.desc: We're making our late-night breakfast for dinner standards with the Waffle House All-Star, Steak and Eggs, and a Fast Food Sausage Breakfast Sandwich.

programme.title: Grill'n After Dark
programme.desc: The Grill Dads bring late-night Mexican food truck eats to your backyard with pollo al pastor tacos, Mission-style carne asada burritos, and mini beef chimichangas.

programme.title: Grill'n After Dark
programme.desc: Tonight is all about chicken comfort-food dishes: a Gochujang Hot Honey Chicken Sandwich, Almost Buffalo Wings, and a Spicy Chicken Salad Wrap. We're going to light the grills, pour some drinks, and show you how to make 'em in your backyard.

programme.title: Andrew Zimmern's Wild Game Kitchen
programme.desc: Chef Andrew Zimmern goes primal with two antelope dishes: a Greek-style whole leg roasted over the open fire with a lemony avgolemono sauce and crispy potatoes, and a simple antelope tenderloin carpaccio served with roasted tomatoes and Parmesan.

programme.title: Andrew Zimmern's Wild Game Kitchen
programme.desc: Chef Andrew Zimmern starts simmering a classic Italian Bolognese sauce, with ground bison, lots of red wine and tomatoes. Then, he adds marinated bison skirt steak tacos with borracho beans to the tailgate menu.

programme.title: Andrew Zimmern's Wild Game Kitchen
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern breaks down a whole rabbit to grill with a spicy, Sichuan sauce and plate with panzanella.

programme.title: Andrew Zimmern's Wild Game Kitchen
programme.desc: Goose, one of Andrew's favorite game birds, is prepared two ways: a French onion soup-style grilled breast sandwich with caramelized onions and melted cheese, and a whole bird, cured, roasted on a beer can, and served with an apple-fennel salad.

programme.title: Andrew Zimmern's Wild Game Kitchen
programme.desc: Chef Andrew Zimmern prepares a traditional Northern Italian-style wild boar ragù. Paired with a hearty bowl of pasta. Next, chef Zimmern blackens beautiful crimson filets of steelhead in a screaming hot cast iron pan.

programme.title: Andrew Zimmern's Wild Game Kitchen
programme.sub-title: Poultry Perfection: Moroccan Spiced Guinea Hen with Charred Vegetables
programme.desc: Andrew unlocks the rich flavor of guinea hen with a vibrant grilled salad featuring watercress and a mustard-hazelnut vinaigrette. Then, he slow-roasts a whole bird with Middle Eastern spices, served with harissa squash and eggplant-tahini purée.

programme.title: Andrew Zimmern's Wild Game Kitchen
programme.desc: Chef Andrew Zimmern breaks down a whole tuna and serves it three ways: grilled, raw, and poached.

programme.title: Andrew Zimmern's Wild Game Kitchen
programme.sub-title: Grilled Squid Salad and Crispy Squid on the Plancha
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern creates a vibrant salad where grilled squid is served with shaved fennel, cherry tomatoes, endive, and a lemon dressing. Then, Andrew shares his country-style squid on the plancha with fresh breadcrumbs, chilies, and a homemade aioli.

programme.title: Andrew Zimmern's Wild Game Kitchen
programme.desc: Chef Andrew Zimmern demystifies working with live sea urchin and scallops by creating a showstopping seafood risotto.

programme.title: Andrew Zimmern's Wild Game Kitchen
programme.sub-title: The Best Fish You're Not Eating
programme.desc: Andrew takes on "little fish, big fish," cooking grilled whole small fish over Japanese charcoal with sesame spinach, and a larger fish in a bold puttanesca-style dish. Simple techniques, big flavor, and a case for eating lower on the food chain.

programme.title: Andrew Zimmern's Wild Game Kitchen
programme.sub-title: Quail Noodle Salad and Antelope Stew
programme.desc: Chef Andrew Zimmern creates Vietnamese cold noodle salad and grilled quail. Next, chef makes antelope stew.

programme.title: Andrew Zimmern's Wild Game Kitchen
programme.sub-title: How to Cook a Whole Pig at Home
programme.desc: Andrew tackles suckling pig with two recipes-his take on a three-cup braise with soy, rice wine, and sesame oil, served with plancha fried rice, and a whole pig roasted over open fire and pulled for Philly-style pork sandwiches with broccoli rabe.

programme.title: Andrew Zimmern's Wild Game Kitchen
programme.sub-title: Bison Tomahawk Chop with Italian-style Eggplant and Panzanella
programme.desc: Chef Andrew Zimmern shares a simple trick for getting the most out of bison tomahawk chops.

programme.title: Andrew Zimmern's Wild Game Kitchen
programme.desc: Chef Andrew prepares a crave-able appetizer of bison tenderloin bites served with tamarind sauce and a classic Hunan peanut sauce. Then chef grills prosciutto-wrapped whole trout stuffed with lemon and herbs served with rice pilaf.

programme.title: Grill'n After Dark
programme.desc: Tonight is a trio of backyard burgers! We're making Oklahoma Smashed Onion Burgers, New York Steakhouse Burgers and Fries, and Bougie Castle-Inspired Sliders.

programme.title: Grill'n After Dark
programme.desc: We're grilling our three favorite styles of pizza tonight: Chicago Tavern with Sausage and Hot Giardiniera, New York Ricotta and Hot Honey, and a spicy Detroit Pepperoni.

programme.title: Grill'n After Dark
programme.desc: It's sandwich night! We're making our favorite handheld late-night delights: Chicken Parm Hero, (Not a Philly) Cheesesteak, and Bodega Chopped Cheese. We're going to light the grills, pour some drinks, and show you how to make 'em in your backyard.

programme.title: Grill'n After Dark
programme.desc: We're making our late-night breakfast for dinner standards with the Waffle House All-Star, Steak and Eggs, and a Fast Food Sausage Breakfast Sandwich.

programme.title: Grill'n After Dark
programme.desc: The Grill Dads bring late-night Mexican food truck eats to your backyard with pollo al pastor tacos, Mission-style carne asada burritos, and mini beef chimichangas.

programme.title: Grill'n After Dark
programme.desc: Tonight is all about chicken comfort-food dishes: a Gochujang Hot Honey Chicken Sandwich, Almost Buffalo Wings, and a Spicy Chicken Salad Wrap. We're going to light the grills, pour some drinks, and show you how to make 'em in your backyard.

programme.title: Andrew Zimmern's Wild Game Kitchen
programme.desc: Chef Andrew Zimmern goes primal with two antelope dishes: a Greek-style whole leg roasted over the open fire with a lemony avgolemono sauce and crispy potatoes, and a simple antelope tenderloin carpaccio served with roasted tomatoes and Parmesan.

programme.title: Andrew Zimmern's Wild Game Kitchen
programme.desc: Chef Andrew Zimmern starts simmering a classic Italian Bolognese sauce, with ground bison, lots of red wine and tomatoes. Then, he adds marinated bison skirt steak tacos with borracho beans to the tailgate menu.

programme.title: Andrew Zimmern's Wild Game Kitchen
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern breaks down a whole rabbit to grill with a spicy, Sichuan sauce and plate with panzanella.

programme.title: Andrew Zimmern's Wild Game Kitchen
programme.desc: Goose, one of Andrew's favorite game birds, is prepared two ways: a French onion soup-style grilled breast sandwich with caramelized onions and melted cheese, and a whole bird, cured, roasted on a beer can, and served with an apple-fennel salad.

programme.title: All Up In My Grill
programme.desc: Comforting and familiar but full of island flavor, right from the grill! Chef Dale roasts pork shoulder with chicharrones, steamy coconut rice and pigeon peas finished with frozen coconut rum drink with a charred banana.

programme.title: All Up In My Grill
programme.desc: Chef Dale Talde grills up summer favorites perfect for any backyard BBQ. Cheddar beer brats in a pretzel bun, BBQ lamb ribs with Chinese mustard sauce, watermelon lime soju punch, & warm donuts with grilled strawberries & whipped cream for dessert.

programme.title: All Up In My Grill
programme.desc: Dale fires up the tandoor grill, turning out juicy chicken thighs, smoky shrimp with Old Bay yogurt, crispy cauliflower, and a silky mango lassi dessert topped with crunchy candied pistachios. Tandoori done right!

programme.title: All Up In My Grill
programme.desc: It's always taco night at Chef Dale's house! He turns up the heat with grilled salmon tacos with salsa verde & cauliflower escabeche, duck al pastor tacos with habanero pineapple salsa, & a smoky mushroom queso taco with truffle mole negro.

programme.title: All Up In My Grill
programme.desc: Dale skewers ribeye, salmon, smoky eggplant dip, and grilled peaches. Food on sticks never tasted better!

programme.title: All Up In My Grill
programme.desc: Japan, Thailand, Turkey, and Mexico street foods inspire Dale to grill with dynamically preparing Chili-Cuman Lamb Mushroom sticks, Grilled pork and shrimp shumai, and scallion pancakes with brown butter labneh.

programme.title: All Up In My Grill
programme.desc: Chef Dale Talde creates a tasty menu that kids & parents alike will love! Apple pancakes with coconut brown butter syrup, grilled cheese & tomato soup, cheesy chicken parm, and a sticky s'mores dessert round out the full day of deliciousness.

programme.title: All Up In My Grill
programme.desc: Big Daddy Dale Talde shows you how to marinate, prep, & grill up the biggest and best steaks out there. From a Hanger Steak with Salsa Verde to a Ribeye with Ginger Chili Relish, and tops it all off with the father of all steaks… The Porterhouse.

programme.title: All Up In My Grill
programme.sub-title: A Festive & Flavorful Christmas in July
programme.desc: Chef Dale Talde grills smoked ham and pineapple praline sliders, sweet potatoes with soy maple bacon, eggplant with labneh and cranberries, a holiday mezze plate and a grilled coquito cocktail.

programme.title: All Up In My Grill
programme.desc: Chef Dale is flipping burgers into art - gooey mac & cheeseburgers, fancy French patties topped with melty bucheron cheese, crispy parm-truffle fries, and peanut butter fudge ice cream sandwiches. Get hungry.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver's Money-Saving Meals
programme.desc: Jamie makes a low-cost dosa, crispy chicken, oozy barley risotto, beef stew and shortbread biscuits.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver's Money-Saving Meals
programme.desc: Jamie makes frugal leftovers fun with spaghetti frittata, bakes air-fryer pork pies using affordable mince, and preps a batch of butternut squash dal. Plus, budget-friendly chicken shish kebabs and thrifty mint choc chip whoopie pies!

programme.title: Jamie Oliver's Money-Saving Meals
programme.sub-title: Easy Stuffed Dumplings and British Fish & Chips
programme.desc: Jamie saves money with easy stuffed leftover dumplings, a budget frozen-fish chip shop cheat, a store-cupboard jar blondie cake, pocket-pleasing pork tacos, and a brilliant air-fryer tinned pineapple tarte tatin dessert!

programme.title: Jamie Oliver's Money-Saving Meals
programme.sub-title: Comforting Mushroom Soup and Cheesy Soda Bread
programme.desc: Jamie cooks a comforting mushroom soup with cheap air-fryer soda bread for under a fiver, stretches ham hocks into a second teardrop gnocchi meal, makes a low-cost air-fryer chicken burger takeaway clone, and bakes thrifty frozen-berry iced buns!

programme.title: Jamie Oliver's Money-Saving Meals
programme.sub-title: Peperonata Eggs on Toast and Baked Cinnamon Apples
programme.desc: Jamie makes a no-cook store-cupboard olive pasta sauce, a cheap frozen-pepper peperonata stew with coddled eggs, a wallet-friendly chicken thigh and bean roast dinner, and budget-clever homemade takeaway kebabs with flatbreads!

programme.title: Jamie Oliver's Money-Saving Meals
programme.sub-title: Easy Chicken Curry and Feta Tomato Pasta
programme.desc: Jamie makes an air-fryer tomato and roast feta pasta using leftover noodles, a budget rolled carrot cake, and a cheap family chicken curry. Plus, an epic cheese-on-toast Welsh rarebit upgrade and frozen fish Chinese-inspired dough parcels!

programme.title: Jamie Oliver: Seasons
programme.sub-title: Stuffed Salmon Celebration and Almond Custard Tart
programme.desc: Jamie snazzes up some spuds with wild garlic pesto, creates a broad bean mezze, rustles up a beautiful spring salad and honours rhubarb in a luscious custard tart with almond brittle.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver: Seasons
programme.sub-title: Summer-y Sweet Pea Risotto and Slow Roasted Pork
programme.desc: Jamie celebrates summer with roasted fennel pork & gratin, oozy pea risotto, and rainbow slaw chicken wraps. He shares edible hanging basket tips. The feast finishes with stunning mackerel on sun-dried tomato couscous with colorful beets.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver: Seasons
programme.sub-title: Buddy's Strawberry Rice Pudding and Summer Tomato Chicken Bake
programme.desc: Jamie cooks a chicken sheet pan dinner with early tomatoes, potatoes and chorizo. Buddy helps pick strawberries for quick jam rice pudding. The summer feast ends with spicy shrimp skewers with homegrown chillies and a refreshing cucumber gazpacho.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver: Seasons
programme.sub-title: Endless Summer: From Grilled Panzanella Salad to Sour Cherry Tart
programme.desc: Jamie ends summer with crispy duck in a rich plum sauce & roast potatoes. Grilled peppers star in panzanella. Garden zucchini become Mediterranean rice. Sweet finale: sour cherry frangipane with crème fraîche.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver: Seasons
programme.sub-title: Summer-y Sweet Pea Risotto and Slow Roasted Pork
programme.desc: Jamie celebrates summer with roasted fennel pork & gratin, oozy pea risotto, and rainbow slaw chicken wraps. He shares edible hanging basket tips. The feast finishes with stunning mackerel on sun-dried tomato couscous with colorful beets.

programme.title: Property Brothers
programme.desc: Busy parents Dorothy and John have been crashing in his parents' basement, and with baby number two on the way they're desperate to find a home of their own. It's a race against time, and the Property Brothers step in with a plan.

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.desc: Breanna & Nick's life revolves around socializing and physical activity. Brian and Sarah convert an old, underused shed into a beautiful, zen'd out yoga studio and create backyard partying, lounging and dining areas.

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.desc: Sonia & Paul are big social connectors in their community with a constant flow of visitors. Brian and Sarah turn their barren backyard into a social hotspot, complete with sunroom, giant chessboard, waterfall and stylish outdoor entertainment spaces.

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.sub-title: A Space For Dancing and Hanging
programme.desc: Susan's energetic son, Harrison, has no space to dance at home without getting under his mom's feet. Brian and Sarah build a hang-out / dance space for Harrison and create a California-inspired pool and lounge area for Susan.

programme.title: Styled
programme.desc: With renters in the basement, Sarah and Shawn have nowhere to go but up to find some tranquility. Nicole and Caffrey take on their dated bedroom and ensuite to create an elevated oasis.

programme.title: Styled
programme.desc: Sisters Leandra and Alayna recently inherited their childhood home. So they've asked Nicole and Caffrey to transform it into a fresh, contemporary space while still honoring the past.

programme.title: Styled
programme.desc: Nicole and Caffrey design an executive rental suite to help supplement Vashti's path to retirement, while real estate agent Kelsey pursues Nicole and Caffrey's much-needed staging expertise to help sell her clients' colorful and chaotic townhouse.

programme.title: Styled
programme.desc: Nicole and Caffrey design a basement getaway for Sharon, Jason and their growing tweens, creating a space where they'll actually want to hang out. They'll also help real estate pro Haaris get his bungalow listing polished up in a competitive market.

programme.title: Styled
programme.desc: Nicole and Caffery bring all the moody design vibes to their first speakeasy lounge for game enthusiasts Krysti and Dana; while real estate agent Natalie's compact condo listing needs staging help to spark it into a luxe and warm downtown home.

programme.title: Styled
programme.sub-title: Old Plan to Open Floor Plan

programme.title: Styled

programme.title: World's Most Secret Homes
programme.desc: Venture into the Spanish countryside to explore an enchanting villa. A cliffside retreat that is ultra-modern. In rural Quebec, a cabin that resembles a pair of binoculars perched on a cliff, and finally a woodland retreat in Portugal.

programme.title: World's Most Secret Homes
programme.desc: A 300-year-old Scottish ruin that's been brought back to life. In the Sierra Nevada mountain, an angular home built from zinc and glass. In Sardinia a stunning waterfront villa. And in Germany, a wartime bunker that lay abandoned for 70 years.

programme.title: World's Most Secret Homes
programme.desc: A striking modern home has been built out of flint, and then to Switzerland to see a sleek glass residence next to a scenic lake. Deep In the woods in New York State, a far-from-average tree house that serves as a dream getaway for a family of five.

programme.title: World's Most Secret Homes
programme.desc: A Norwegian mountain cabin that is so remote it is only accessed by helicopter. A family retreat embedded into rocks in the Californian desert. In Brazil, an epic jungle lodge.

programme.title: World's Most Secret Homes
programme.desc: In the Cotswolds, UK, a unique home built into a lake. Lake Ontario, a home that resembles an ocean liner, and then to Portugal, where in land, a ruin has been transformed into a minimalist's dream with a pool concealed in the roof.

programme.title: World's Most Secret Homes
programme.desc: A futuristic villa built on the edge of a lake in Austria. A cabin perched on the edge of a river. A unique beachside house built into the rock, and in rural England a modern mirrored house, designed to blend into and reflect its rural setting.

programme.title: World's Most Secret Homes
programme.desc: Head to the Serra Da Mantiqueira Mountains, Brazil, to explore a 2000 square metre, grid-shaped family home hidden in nature, then visit a wartime bunker on the Isle of Wight in the UK that's been transformed into an ultra modern home.

programme.title: World's Most Secret Homes
programme.desc: Explore a palatial cliff-top villa complete with indoor and outdoor pools. A remote cliff-top home deep in West Virginia and then uncover a retreat built into rocks on the rural outskirts of Stockholm.

programme.title: Million Dollar Dream Home
programme.sub-title: The Ultimate Home for Art Lovers
programme.desc: George and Bill are looking to cut their commute and move to the city. They're visiting some of the most desirable properties in Palo Alto, California. Will they find their dream home?

programme.title: Million Dollar Dream Home

programme.title: Million Dollar Dream Home
programme.sub-title: A Perfect Home To Start A Family

programme.title: Million Dollar Dream Home
programme.sub-title: A Villa Escape With Classic Charm

programme.title: Million Dollar Dream Home
programme.desc: Eddie and Esperanza are looking for a home that'll cut down their commute. They're visiting some of the most desirable properties in Los Gatos, California. Will they find their dream home?

programme.title: Million Dollar Dream Home

programme.title: Million Dollar Dream Home

programme.title: Million Dollar Dream Home
programme.sub-title: An English Manor in the Golden State

programme.title: Million Dollar Dream Home

programme.title: Property Brothers
programme.desc: Tyler and Lindsay love their waterfront lifestyle, but desperately need a family home where they can put down roots. Drew and Jonathan help them find a property in their exclusive neighborhood with minimal compromise.

programme.title: Property Brothers
programme.desc: Super-planner Carson has been crashing at her best friend Leah's place. But it's time she found a Nashville pad of her own. Carson knows exactly what she wants, but finding a picture-perfect property that meets her high standards could prove tricky.

programme.title: Property Brothers
programme.desc: With a baby on the way, Emily and Ken are searching for the perfect suburban home close to family. And since their condo sold more quickly than expected, they're crashing in her sister's basement until they find 'the one'.

programme.title: Property Brothers
programme.desc: Tre and Amanda have been living in a rental for nearly three years, and as the kids get bigger their temporary home is getting smaller. They're ready to find a place of their own and are determined to stay in their exclusive lakefront community.

programme.title: Property Brothers
programme.desc: Newlyweds, busy professionals, and animal lovers, Sophie, Tim, and their two dogs are determined to get out of his cramped condo. But with their mile-long wish list, finding a perfect modern property will take a minor miracle.

programme.title: Property Brothers
programme.desc: Kristin recently packed up her busy life and moved to the city of her dreams, and now the search is on for a cozy and eclectic Nashville pad that's big enough for a new dog and her best friend from back home, Kacy.

programme.title: Property Brothers
programme.desc: Busy parents Dorothy and John have been crashing in his parents' basement, and with baby number two on the way they're desperate to find a home of their own. It's a race against time, and the Property Brothers step in with a plan.

programme.title: Property Brothers
programme.desc: Stephanie and Marc are getting frustrated with their house hunt. They've been outbid on a series of properties in the city, and the Property Brothers try to sell them on a radically different approach.

programme.title: Property Brothers
programme.desc: Tre and Amanda have been living in a rental for nearly three years, and as the kids get bigger their temporary home is getting smaller. They're ready to find a place of their own and are determined to stay in their exclusive lakefront community.

programme.title: Property Brothers
programme.desc: Tom and TJ moved to Nashville to pursue a dream job, but they haven't yet put down roots and are cramped into a friend's studio apartment until they do.

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.desc: H and her tenant Emma are bursting out of their 3-unit home. To help out both landlord and tenants, Brian and Sarah add storage space, plus a common lounge space in the backyard, with some urban inspired design touches.

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.desc: Kirsten works from the home office, while Joel is a sales representative with a make-shift workspace in their bedroom. To help this couple, Brian and Sarah look to the backyard for space to retrofit an old shipping container into an office.

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.desc: Janet's love for her nine grandkids is endless. But so is the chaos they bring inside her home when they come visit. To take that energy outside, Brian and Sarah build a fun kid-zone in the backyard, but also a sophisticated adult area for Janet.

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.desc: Jenn and Josh don't have enough space in their semi-detached home to enjoy their hobbies. Brian and Sarah build a stylish lounge space and convert the existing garage into a multipurpose space for crafting and playing guitar.

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.desc: Nicole and Charles have 3 kids, and their neighborhood parties are getting too big for their front porch. So Brian and Sarah add more entertaining space in the backyard, plus a 4-season garage conversion with a nautical theme.

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.desc: Matt, Mary and their 2 kids don't use their backyard because the neighboring ravine has taken over. Brian and Sarah face environmental challenges to create a beautiful, entertaining and play space for the whole family to enjoy.

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.desc: Dave and Jorge love art and entertaining, but with tenants in their basement and no creative space inside, Brian and Sarah turn their backyard into a creative party lounge and build a shipping container-inspired structure for an industrial feel.

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.desc: Breanna & Nick's life revolves around socializing and physical activity. Brian and Sarah convert an old, underused shed into a beautiful, zen'd out yoga studio and create backyard partying, lounging and dining areas.

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.sub-title: A Space For Dancing and Hanging
programme.desc: Susan's energetic son, Harrison, has no space to dance at home without getting under his mom's feet. Brian and Sarah build a hang-out / dance space for Harrison and create a California-inspired pool and lounge area for Susan.

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.desc: Amy & Terry love nothing more than spending time outside with their daughters. Brian and Sarah build a dream enclosure to hang out in on summer nights, with a swimming pool change room and a new deck where Terry can grill.

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.desc: Tina and her husband Patrick have a home that is overrun with both baking supplies and soccer equipment. To extend this family's living space, Brian and Sarah turn their backyard into one part cake decorating studio and one part soccer field.

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.desc: Paris lovers, Louise and Rick, want to share their European enthusiasm with their two daughters without racking up the mileage. Brian and Sarah build them a French-inspired urban escape. It's Paris in their backyard! C'est magnifique!

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.desc: Aarati & Dave both work from home, forcing their living room to be a triple duty working/living/children's play area. Brian and Sarah create a flexible structure, install a sleek and sophisticated plunge pool, and create an outdoor fireplace lounge.

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.desc: France & Marc's home is being outgrown by their sport-obsessed sons and provides no inspiring space for France to work from home. Brian and Sarah convert a rundown garage into a spot where France can work and carved out safe sports areas.

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.desc: Sham, Ruban and their twin boys aren't using their big, boring backyard. To help this family embrace the great outdoors, Brian and Sarah build a vacation style getaway, with a beach volleyball court and a kid's clubhouse.

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.desc: Melissa and Lee's 3 boys need more room for sports, and Mom needs more peace and quiet! So Brian and Sarah turn the underused backyard into a sports court, a new lounge space, and a luxurious, 3-season Mom's retreat.

programme.title: Gordon Ramsay's Road Trip
programme.desc: Gordon, Gino and Fred start their road trip in Gino's homeland of Italy, where Gino needs help to pull off an event that is close to his heart. Gino collects Gordon and Fred in a campervan to begin a road trip they won't be forgetting in a hurry.

programme.title: Gordon Ramsay's Road Trip
programme.desc: Gordon, Gino and Fred travel to France, where Fred has been asked to co-host an Oyster Festival in the beautiful Arcachon Bay, in just four days' time. Reunited with their campervan, Fred nominates himself as the driver in his homeland.

programme.title: Gordon Ramsay's Road Trip
programme.desc: The trio heads to Scotland as Gordon prepares to cook a feast for the chief of Clan Ramsay and his friends. Gordon shows the others how to dress like real Scotsmen as they go in search of Scottish beef, hunt for scallops and play some Highland Games.

programme.title: Gordon Ramsay's Road Trip
programme.sub-title: Mamma Mia! Off We Go Again

programme.title: Gordon Ramsay's Road Trip
programme.sub-title: Go Greek! Clash of the Titans

programme.title: World's Most Secret Hotels
programme.desc: The team explores unusual hotels in Uruguay, Sweden, Scotland, Oman and The Netherlands, from a fort-like resort to an isolated hotel.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: Gualberto "Weber" Elizondo surprised his family when his grilling hobby turned him into a local celebrity and internet sensation. Meanwhile, chef Chuy Villareal of Cara De Vaca wants the world to know that the north of Mexico isn't just carne asada.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: Two sisters made a little shack on the Rio Ramos into a must-visit restaurant known for one dish: cortadillo stew. Down the road, another restaurant uses traditional stews in their famous empalmes.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: Nuevo León is divided between two pro soccer teams: Los Tigres and Los Rayados. Pati tries the food at each stadium with the teams' stars to determine who wins in the battle of tortas vs tacos.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: Irving Quiroz wrote the book on Mexican bread. Pati visits his workshop for his secret to making the perfect campechana, then meets Chuy Elizondo, owner of one of the hottest brunch spots in town.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: The Garza family invites Pati to their vineyard to help the community make piloncillo - and it's hard work! Then, in the magic town of Bustamante, three sisters make traditional bread in adobe ovens.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: Gaby Molinar owns Huerto Urbano, an urban farm dedicated to providing Monterrey with nutritious, diverse local ingredients. And her husband is one of the region's greatest culinary pioneers.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.sub-title: Cantina Culture and the Morning After?
programme.desc: Cantinas have historically been bars where men gather to drink and sing about their broken hearts. Historian David Canales takes Pati to historic locations. Then she tries the best tacos in town.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.sub-title: Texas BBQ in the Orange Belt
programme.desc: Pati visits BBQ champion Luis Rivas to taste his Mexican take on Texas-style BBQ, and he hosts a traditional carne asada at his family's orange grove. Then Pati learns how Glorias candies are made.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: Chef Hugo Guajardo researches the best of Nuevo León's ingredients. He and Pati visit a family-owned restaurant that has perfected the art of drying meat. Then, she tries his famed charred chicken.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: Pati's climber friends take her on an adventure to the Sierra Madre mountains, followed by a quick elote snack. Later, Pati connects with four top chefs for a carne asada with a mountain backdrop.

programme.title: Europe's Greatest Train Journeys
programme.desc: Andalusia, now crossed by high-speed and modernized rail lines, unveils its rich culture and landscapes; along the journey, we visit cities like Seville, Granada with its famed Alhambra and Guadix near the Tabernas Desert.

programme.title: Europe's Greatest Train Journeys
programme.desc: In Greece, the Intercity Express travels from Thessaloniki to Athens, passing sites like the Meteora peaks, Delphi ruins and the Acropolis; the journey continues to the Peloponnese on Greece's last cogwheel train.

programme.title: Europe's Greatest Train Journeys
programme.desc: In Portugal, in the Douro River Valley, a steam locomotive and a small historic train will take you in turn to the water's edge, on the only railroad line in the world that crosses three World Heritage Sites classified by UNESCO.

programme.title: Europe's Greatest Train Journeys
programme.desc: Corsica, the Island of Beauty, is best explored by railway; from Mediterranean waters to towering peaks, stops include Algajola for a seaside dive, Vizzavona on the GR20 trail and historic cities like Corte with its citadel.

programme.title: Europe's Greatest Train Journeys
programme.desc: The Little Yellow Train winds through the Eastern Pyrenees, crossing the Cerdan plateau, the historic Gisclard railway suspension bridge and the Grandes Canalettes caves, known as the underground Versailles of the Pyrenees.

programme.title: Europe's Greatest Train Journeys
programme.desc: The Cinque Terre Express runs along Italy's northern coast east of Genoa; passing through five UNESCO-listed villages, it offers coastal views and access to cobbled streets, harbors, terraced vineyards and pastel-colored houses.

programme.title: Europe's Greatest Train Journeys
